latin: Inventor gravissime monuit: 'flumina armorum numquam miscete. exitus pessimus erit.' 'quam pessimus?' rogavit socius. 'omnis protoplasma in universo simul displodetur.'

questions.target: Never cross the streams of the weapons
choices: Never cross the streams of the weapons

questions.prompt: What would happen if they did?
questions.target: All matter in the universe would explode
choices: All matter in the universe would explode

translation: The inventor warned most gravely: 'Never cross the streams of the weapons. The outcome will be terrible.' 'How terrible?' asked his partner. 'All matter in the universe will explode at once.'
